question: Location name, state, aur district list karein jahan households ki sankhya occupied residential houses se zyada ho, aur households ki sankhya ke hisaab se highest to lowest order mein arrange karein.

question: 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' state mein 1991 census year ke liye un locations ki location name, location type, aur total number of households dikhaiye jahan total number of households 100 se zyada ho, aur results ko total number of households ke hisaab se descending order mein rank karein.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.LOCATION_NAME, T1.LOCATION_TYPE, SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSING AS T2 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T2.HIERARCHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T2.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991 GROUP BY T1.LOCATION_NAME, T1.LOCATION_TYPE HAVING SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) > 100 ORDER BY SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.location_name, 
    d.location_type, 
    h.number_of_households
FROM 
    dim_geography_hierarchy d
JOIN 
    fact_housing h ON d.hierarchy_id = h.hierarchy_id
WHERE 
    d.state ILIKE 'andaman and nicobar islands' 
    AND h.census_year = 1991
    AND h.number_of_households > 100
ORDER BY 
    h.number_of_households DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    d.location_name, 
    d.location_type, 
    h.number_of_households
FROM 
    dim_geography_hierarchy d

    fact_housing h ON d.hierarchy_id = h.hierarchy_id

question: Location name, state, aur district dikhaiye, saath hi total male scheduled caste population aur total female scheduled caste population un areas ke liye jahan households ki sankhya occupied residential houses se zyada ho, aur yeh ensure karein ki kam se kam ek housing record maujood ho; results ko location name, state, aur district ke hisaab se group karein aur unhe total male scheduled caste population ke descending order mein arrange karein.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.LOCATION_NAME, T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT, SUM(T3.MALE_SCHEDULED_CASTE_POPULATION), SUM(T3.FEMALE_SCHEDULED_CASTE_POPULATION) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSING AS T2 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T2.HIERARCHY_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION_SOCIAL_CATEGORY AS T3 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T3.HIERARCHY_ID WHERE T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS > T2.NUMBER_OF_OCCUPIED_RESIDENTIAL_HOUSES GROUP BY T1.LOCATION_NAME, T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSING_ID) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(T3.MALE_SCHEDULED_CASTE_POPULATION) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.LOCATION_NAME, 
    d.STATE, 
    d.DISTRICT, 
    SUM(s.MALE_SCHEDULED_CASTE_POPULATION) AS total_male_scheduled_caste,
    SUM(s.FEMALE_SCHEDULED_CASTE_POPULATION) AS total_female_scheduled_caste
FROM 
    DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY d
JOIN 
    FACT_HOUSING h ON d.HIERARCHY_ID = h.HIERARCHY_ID
JOIN 
    FACT_POPULATION_SOCIAL_CATEGORY s ON d.HIERARCHY_ID = s.HIERARCHY_ID

    h.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS > h.NUMBER_OF_OCCUPIED_RESIDENTIAL_HOUSES

question: 1991 ke census year ke liye, har district ko list karo jismein uski total population ka sum aur households ki sankhya ka sum ho, un districts ko filter karo jahan total population 500 se zyada hai, aur results ko total population aur households ki sankhya ke ratio ke hisaab se descending order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT, SUM(T3.TOTAL_POPULATION), SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSING AS T2 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T2.HIERARCHY_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION_CORE AS T3 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T3.HIERARCHY_ID WHERE T2.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991 AND T3.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T3.TOTAL_POPULATION) > 500 ORDER BY SUM(T3.TOTAL_POPULATION) / SUM(T2.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.DISTRICT,
    SUM(fc.TOTAL_POPULATION) AS total_population,
    SUM(fh.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS) AS total_households
FROM 
    DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY d
JOIN 
    FACT_POPULATION_CORE fc ON d.HIERARCHY_ID = fc.HIERARCHY_ID
JOIN 
    FACT_HOUSING fh ON d.HIERARCHY_ID = fh.HIERARCHY_ID
WHERE 
    fc.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991
GROUP BY 
    d.DISTRICT
HAVING 
    SUM(fc.TOTAL_POPULATION) > 500
ORDER BY 
    (SUM(fc.TOTAL_POPULATION) / SUM(fh.NUMBER_OF_HOUSEHOLDS)) DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    d.DISTRICT,
    SUM(fc.TOTAL_POPULATION) AS total_population,
